_description: Default room dimensions used by Ana when the client has not specified a size. Derived from Oficio Taller real project data (01.13 ESTIMACIÓN ÁREAS). All dimensions in meters. Adjust based on program interview responses.
_source: Oficio Taller Drive — 01.13 ESTIMACIÓN ÁREAS (Jocelyn & David beach home, Sep 2025; Zipolite, Aug 2025; CALETA 80, Aug 2025)

walls_and_circulations._note: Add this percentage to the sum of programmed spaces in each section to get the section subtotal. Do not add walls % to uncovered areas that are open hardscape (parking, pool deck) — use 15% for service/access paths only.

standalone_residential._note: Use for private houses on individually owned lots. Adjust sizes up for high-end projects, down for compact/affordable.

entry_circulation.name: LOBBY
entry_circulation.notes: Scale up to 4x4 for large/formal homes

entry_circulation.name: STAIRCASE
entry_circulation.notes: Single staircase; add second if program requires

entry_circulation.name: ELEVATOR
entry_circulation.notes: Include only if client requests or accessibility requires

social.name: DINING ROOM
social.notes: Formal dining; reduce to 4x4 if open-plan

social.name: FAMILY ROOM
social.notes: Include if client wants separate TV/casual space

social.name: STUDY / LIBRARY
social.notes: Optional; can double as home office

kitchen_service.name: KITCHEN
kitchen_service.notes: Open kitchen; reduce to 4x5 if closed

kitchen_service.name: PANTRY / BUTLERS KITCHEN
kitchen_service.notes: Include if client wants full pantry or separate prep area

kitchen_service.name: LAUNDRY
kitchen_service.notes: Standalone room; can reduce to 2.5x3 if compact

kitchen_service.name: SERVICE QUARTER
kitchen_service.notes: Bedroom + bath for live-in staff; include only if requested

kitchen_service.name: STORAGE
kitchen_service.notes: General utility storage; scale to program

primary_suite.name: PRIMARY BEDROOM
primary_suite.notes: Standard primary; increase to 5x6 for large suite

primary_suite.name: BATHROOM (PRIMARY)
primary_suite.notes: Full ensuite with double vanity, shower, tub

primary_suite.name: WALK IN CLOSET (PRIMARY)
primary_suite.notes: Scale up to 3x5 for large closets

secondary_bedrooms.name: BEDROOM
secondary_bedrooms.notes: Standard secondary bedroom; children's rooms often 3.5x4.0

secondary_bedrooms.name: BATHROOM (SHARED)
secondary_bedrooms.notes: Shared bath between 2 bedrooms; add jack-and-jill note if applicable

secondary_bedrooms.name: GUEST BEDROOM
secondary_bedrooms.notes: Guest rooms typically larger than secondary; include sitting area if client wants

special_spaces.name: HOME OFFICE
special_spaces.notes: Private office; double size if 2 workstations

special_spaces.name: GYM
special_spaces.notes: Include if client requests; minimum 4x4 for basic equipment

special_spaces.name: WINE CELLAR
special_spaces.notes: Small cellar; scale up if serious collector

garage.name: ENCLOSED GARAGE (1 CAR)
garage.notes: Single car; add 3m width per additional car

covered_outdoor.name: OUTDOOR DINING
covered_outdoor.notes: Covered outdoor dining; can merge with living

covered_outdoor.name: GRILL / ASADOR / BAR
covered_outdoor.notes: Built-in grill area; scale to program

covered_outdoor.name: COVERED TERRACE
covered_outdoor.notes: General covered terrace; use when client doesn't specify living vs dining

covered_outdoor.name: OUTDOOR BATHROOMS
covered_outdoor.notes: Pool-side bathrooms; include if outdoor entertaining is in scope

uncovered_areas.name: POOL
uncovered_areas.notes: Standard pool; infinity edge or lap pool may be larger. Plunge pool: 3x5

uncovered_areas.name: JACUZZI / HOT TUB
uncovered_areas.notes: Standalone jacuzzi; may be integrated into pool

uncovered_areas.name: ROOF DECK
uncovered_areas.notes: Rooftop terrace; size per roof availability

uncovered_areas.name: EXTERIOR PARKING SPOTS
uncovered_areas.notes: Per space; multiply by number of spots

uncovered_areas.name: VEGETABLE GARDEN / HUERTO
uncovered_areas.notes: Raised bed garden; scale to client preference

residential_in_development._note: Same room defaults as standalone_residential. Covered outdoor areas may be smaller due to HOA setback requirements. Confirm pool size with HOA guidelines.

_overrides._reason: HOA developments often have tighter setbacks; reduce covered terraces slightly

commercial_hotel._note: Hotel room sizes per SECTUR classification. Use these for typical guestrooms. Lobby, F&B, and amenities are project-specific — document in assumptions.

guestroom_by_category._note: Area per guestroom (bedroom + bathroom + circulation). For suites, multiply by 1.5–2x.

public_areas._note: Rules of thumb for hotel programming. Actual sizes must be confirmed per program interview.

commercial_health_center._note: COFEPRIS-compliant minimum room sizes. See NOM-197-SSA1 and related NOMs for regulatory minimums.
